input.message: We cannot process your refund. As per our policy you should have submitted within 30 days.

assumptions: Reframe applies pattern-based rules — human review recommended for high-stakes communications
Does not modify factual content or commitments

output.reframed_message: what we are able to do is process your refund. To make sure things go smoothly for you you should have submitted within 30 days.
rationale: Replaced restrictive 'we cannot' to possibility-focused 'what we can do'
Converted restrictive 'we cannot' to possibility-focused 'what we can do'
Softened formal policy references to user-benefit framing
